name: native-poc-implementation
description: PoC at ddl-native.test.ts demonstrates working implementation with ~250 lines: mapJsonSchemaTypeToSQL(), generateCreateTable(), generateForeignKeys(), topologicalSort(), schemaToSQL(). All 18 tests pass. Architecture is functional, not class-based.
relevantCode:
function mapJsonSchemaTypeToSQL(prop: JsonSchemaProperty, dialect: SQLDialect): string
function generateCreateTable(tableName: string, model: JsonSchemaModel, dialect: SQLDialect): string
function topologicalSort(models: Record<string, JsonSchemaModel>): string[]
recommendation: Use PoC as reference architecture but refactor for production: separate type mapping, constraint inference, and SQL generation into distinct modules. Add structured output format.
